creator: nakaji@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
>>>>> In <200804230310.m3N3A19C014435@freefall.freebsd.org> 
>>>>>	FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=123003

> >Category:       ports
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
> >Synopsis:       [PATCH] textproc/docbook: ignore an error by xmlcatmgr
> >Arrival-Date:   Wed Apr 23 03:10:01 UTC 2008

All docbook-[0-9]*/Makefile need smillar change. Here is an updated patch.

Index: docbook-241/Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/textproc/docbook-241/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.18
diff -u -r1.18 Makefile
--- docbook-241/Makefile	15 Apr 2006 06:46:10 -0000	1.18
+++ docbook-241/Makefile	23 Apr 2008 06:09:29 -0000
@@ -49,6 +49,6 @@
 	@${CHOWN} -R ${SHAREOWN}:${SHAREGRP} ${INSTDIR}
 
 post-install:
-	@${XMLCATMGR} -sc ${CATALOG_PORTS_SGML} add CATALOG ${PORTNAME}/${DTD_VERSION}/catalog
+	@-${XMLCATMGR} -sc ${CATALOG_PORTS_SGML} add CATALOG ${PORTNAME}/${DTD_VERSION}/catalog
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
